reasoning: The value is derived from the 'FIDE rankings' Wikipedia page, which strictly mirrors FIDE's official monthly Top 100 lists. I checked the Wikipedia page as of March 4, 2026, and it already displays the March 1 list with Divya Deshmukh's rating at 2497. Because FIDE updates these lists on the 1st of each month, the rating displayed on the Wikipedia page will remain 2497 on both March 15 and March 22. Furthermore, tournament schedules show she will not compete again until the Candidates on March 28, meaning there is no live rating change to incorrectly prompt an early update anyway, ruling out any possibility of a 1% (+25 Elo) increase.
